rootCause: The style-card preview surface was not an actionable control, so clicking the visible image had no effect.
The style application completed through route state but did not expose a persistent parameter and Cube proof near the workspace preview.
Preview assets were present; their common procedural calibration composition made the non-actionable cards appear empty or inert.
recommendedNextTask: S17.3-SAVE after the user completes final visual approval.
notes: A Cube content hash includes TITLE and metadata comments, so a preview-manifest Cube hash can differ from a workspace export hash while RGB samples remain generated from the same style parameters.
The regression test fixes the export title and look name, then proves all twelve style parameter and 33-point Cube hashes are distinct and stable.
No user media, vendor LUT binaries, generated downloads, dist files, or node_modules files are included in the Git change set.
